title: Teresa Bien
compiled_truth: Teresa Bien is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-05-08 to 2000-06-30), Teresa Bien sent 3 and received 15 emails, totalling 18 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (3), [Grant Masson](people/grant-masson) (2), [Pinnamaneni Krishnarao](people/pinnamaneni-krishnarao) (1), [Samer Takriti](people/samer-takriti) (1), [Stinson Gibner](people/stinson-gibner) (1).
